ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "style_code" TEXT /* Unique style code for the item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for subcategories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium) */,
  "chest_size" TEXT /* Chest size measurement range */,
  "length_size" TEXT /* Length size measurement range */,
  "neck_size" TEXT /* Neck size measurement range */,
  "bicep_size" TEXT /* Bicep size measurement range */,
  "height_size" TEXT /* Height size measurement range */,
  "waist_size" TEXT /* Waist size measurement range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the size chart entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size referenced in the chart */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., chest, length) */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Range of measurement for this size */,
  "clothing_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock for this size */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for this item size */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sale transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold in the transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price of the item at the time of sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., admin, read-only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the return transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_history ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "sales_quantity" INTEGER /* Total sales quantity for the item */,
  "inventory_quantity" INTEGER /* Current inventory quantity for the item */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "trend_analysis" TEXT /* Trend analysis based on historical sales data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the discount */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_history ("order_id")
)
